alignments.name: Metadata Co-pilot Workbench (frontend/)
supportsGoal: Data quality directly impacts bot accuracy
Agent Chat provides scalable HITL feedback
distractsFromGoal: Highest-quality implementation invested here instead of user-facing bot
Separate React/TypeScript stack adds maintenance cost
fragmentsExperience: No connection between workbench and chatbot
No 'flag data issue' workflow from bot
missesObservability: Cannot trace impact of normalization fix on bot accuracy
No metrics on which metadata gaps cause most bot failures
alignments.verdict: Valuable internal operations tool. Risk: over-investment here starves the actual product.

alignments.name: QA Tool (app/ui_qa/)
supportsGoal: Only tool for measuring bot accuracy with TP/FP/FN
Gold set export enables regression CI gate
Find Missing is uniquely irreplaceable for FN discovery
distractsFromGoal: Exposes internal pipeline complexity inappropriate for end users
fragmentsExperience: Tests raw query execution, not bot's two-phase flow
duplicatesEffort: Gold Set page duplicates app/qa.py regression runner
missesObservability: Cannot test full bot conversation path
alignments.verdict: Valuable measurement infrastructure. Should evolve to test full two-phase conversational flow.

alignments.name: Chat UI (app/ui_chat/)
supportsGoal: IS the product -- only place users interact with bot
alignments.verdict: The concept is essential but the Streamlit implementation is a prototype. Primary alignment failure: strongest React went to wrong UI.

alignments.name: CLI (app/cli.py)
alignments.verdict: Essential developer tool. Well-implemented and necessary.

alignments.name: QA Regression Runner (app/qa.py)
supportsGoal: Regression testing essential for CI gates
fragmentsExperience: Separate app instead of CLI subcommand
duplicatesEffort: Duplicates QA Tool Gold Set page
missesObservability: Tests different code path than users experience
alignments.verdict: Redundant as standalone file. Should be consolidated as CLI subcommand.

alignments.name: FastAPI Backend (app/api/)
fragmentsExperience: WebSocket uses old path, not two-phase flow
metadata.py is 46% of code serving internal tool
duplicatesEffort: Two conversation implementations in one file
alignments.verdict: Essential infrastructure. Growing complex. WebSocket must use same two-phase flow as HTTP.
